title: allionia lanceolata var. uniflora
intro: Allionia lanceolata var. uniflora, also known as Mexican creeping four o'clock, is a perennial plant in the Four O'Clock family native to Mexico and parts of the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Allionia lanceolata var. uniflora include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
